languages.text:
Visions of the Warp: -5 WS, -5 BS, -5 PER, -5 WP.
Stacks up to 6 times.
Allies with Conviction Heretical 2 are unaffected.

traits.locale_text:
Visions of the Warp: -5 WS, -5 BS, -5 PER, -5 WP.
Stacks up to 6 times.
Allies with Conviction Heretical 2 are unaffected.

languages.text:
The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.
If the character has {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} — Adherent or above, they are not affected.

traits.locale_text:
The target suffers −5 Weapon Skill, −5 Ballistic Skill, −5 Perception, and −5 Willpower. Stacks up to 6 times.
If the character has Heretical — Adherent or above, they are not affected.

The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.

The target suffers −5 Weapon Skill, −5 Ballistic Skill, −5 Perception, and −5 Willpower. Stacks up to 6 times.
If the character has Heretical — Adherent or above, they are not affected.

The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.
If the character has {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} — Adherent or above, they are not affected.

languages.text:
Цель получает −5 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнему Бою{/g}, −5 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g}, −5 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятию{/g} и −5 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воле{/g}. Суммируется до 6 раз.
Если персонаж обладает убеждением {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Еретик{/g} (сторонник или выше), на него не действует этот эффект.
languages.original_text:

languages.text:
La cible subit une pénalité de −5 à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g}, à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g}. Cumulable jusqu'à 6 fois.
Si le personnage possède {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Hérétique{/g} — Partisan (ou rang supérieur), il n'est pas affecté.
languages.original_text:
The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.

languages.text:
Hedefin {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} nitelikleri 5'er puan azalır. 6 kez üst üste birikebilir.
Karakter, {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Kâfirce{/g} — Taraftar veya üzeri kanaate sahipse etkilenmez.
languages.original_text:
The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.

traits.locale_text:
Hedefin {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} nitelikleri 5'er puan azalır. 6 kez üst üste birikebilir.
Karakter, {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Kâfirce{/g} — Taraftar veya üzeri kanaate sahipse etkilenmez.

languages.text:
目标的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}各降低5点，最多叠加6次。
如果角色拥有信念：{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}异端主义{/g}——拥护者或更高等级，则不受影响。
languages.original_text:
The target suffers −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. Stacks up to 6 times.
If the character has {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Heretical{/g} — Adherent or above, they are not affected.

目标的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}各降低5点，最多叠加6次。
如果角色拥有信念：{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}异端主义{/g}——拥护者或更高等级，则不受影响。

languages.text:
El objetivo sufre −5 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}, −5 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Habilidad de proyectiles{/g}, −5 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} y −5 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g}. Este efecto se acumula un máximo de 6 veces.
Si el personaje tiene {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Hereje{/g} — Partidario o superior, no se ve afectado.

languages.text:
Das Ziel hat −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistik-Fähigkeit{/g}, −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} und −5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g}. Bis zu 6-mal stapelbar.
Hat der Charakter {g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}Ketzer{/g} — Anhänger oder höher, ist er nicht betroffen.

languages.text:
対象は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}近接技能{/g}−5、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}射撃技能{/g}−5、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g}−5、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}−5を受ける。最大6回までスタックする。
キャラクターが{g|Encyclopedia:SoulMarkCorruption}異端{/g}—信奉者以上を持つ場合、影響を受けない。
